zh.lifeSummary: Hugh De Maunsell是De Maunsell和Lucy Scurlage的兒子，於1340年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。他於1370年與Isabel Penrice (Penrys)在英國素福爾可貝利哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1380年在英國賀福爾吉爾培可享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugh De Maunsell是De Maunsell和Lucy Scurlage的儿子，于1340年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。他于1370年与Isabel Penrice (Penrys)在英国素福爾可貝利哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1380年在英国賀福爾吉爾培可享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maunsell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: Hugh De Maunsell was born in 1340, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England as the son of De Maunsell and Lucy Scurlage. He married Isabel Penrice (Penrys) in 1370, in Baylham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1380, in Kilpeck, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 40.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh De Maunsellは1340年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムでDe MaunsellとLucy Scurlageの息子として生まれた。1370年にイギリススフォルクバイルハムでIsabel Penrice (Penrys)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1380年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキルペックで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh De Maunsell(은)는 1340년 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 De Maunsell(와)과 Lucy Scurlage의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1370년 영국 수폴크 베이함에서 Isabel Penrice (Penrys)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1380년 영국 허퍼드실르 킬펙에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugh De Maunsell родился в 1340 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия. Его родителей звали De Maunsell и Lucy Scurlage. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Penrice (Penrys) в 1370 г. в местности беилхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1380 г. в местности килпекк, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.
